name: Order Flow Scalping
description: Exploits order flow imbalance (OFI) on Binance Futures or MT5, aligning with liquidity sweeps and Fair Value Gaps (FVG) for low-latency scalping.

ofi_threshold.description: OFI Z-Score threshold for triggering entry signals

max_slippage_pips.description: Maximum allowed execution slippage in pips

atr_period.description: ATR period for SL offset calculation

sl_offset_multiplier.description: ATR multiplier for Stop Loss cushion

sweep_lookback_ticks.description: Number of ticks to look back for swing high/low sweep confirmation
